commands.review_summary:
The PR moves built-in agent-core harness message types into the shared agent-core type surface and expands tsdown pre-cleaning to remove package dist roots before build.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +4, Other +7. Total +18 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. the source path is clear: current cleanup only removes root build outputs while tsdown also emits package dist outputs, and the PR adds a focused stale package-dist test. I did not rerun the build or tests because this review is read-only.
